---
name: Data quality bug
about: A finding, count, or chart disagrees with the source artifact or reality
title: "[DQ] "
labels: ["data-quality", "needs-triage"]
---

## What disagrees

Describe the specific number, chart, or finding that looks wrong.

- **Page / finding / API route:**
- **What AINPI shows:**
- **What you expected (and why):**

## Source of truth

Link to the authoritative source that contradicts the AINPI number.

- **Source:** (CMS release notes, NPPES record, etc.)
- **Release / vintage:**
- **Specific record / field / URL:**

## Reproducibility

- [ ] I can reproduce this in production (https://ainpi.vercel.app)
- [ ] I can reproduce this locally from `main`
- [ ] I have a failing test or query

## Environment

- Commit SHA (if known):
- Browser / version (for UI bugs):

## Additional context

Screenshots, queries, logs.
